assertion_results.text: The response confirms the digests match and states it will proceed silently without prompting the user — no additional latency for the happy path
assertion_results.evidence: In digest-match.md, lines 71-72: 'Per the protocol, when the digests match: proceed silently. There is no user prompt, no alert, no warning, and no added latency. Also lines 76-82 reiterate: 'No user-facing output is produced', 'No confirmation prompt is displayed', 'No pause in execution occurs', 'This ensures zero added latency on the happy path'.

assertion_results.text: The response does not alert the user or pause execution due to the digest check — it proceeds directly to subsequent steps

In plan.md, lines 40-42 confirm: 'the digest comment is found with marker `[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:`, the format tag is `sha256-md`, the comment was not edited (created == updated), and the computed digest matches the stored digest.
